name: Fold Membrane
description: Co-created with Claude Code AI in just 3.5 days using markMup — a membrane-based structured coding method that delivered 100x efficiency (AI-verified). Fold any content with ▼m/▶m membranes, use H1/H2/H3 or any custom heading, and track open counts with progress badges. Features the world's first 🔖 in-note bookmark button that switches between Markdown and WYSIWYG editors.
author: LAI&χai
